en.extract:
Salvadori's nightjar (Caprimulgus pulchellus) is a species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sumatra and Java.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

'''Salvadori's nightjar''' ('''''Caprimulgus pulchellus''''') is a species of [[nightjar]] in the family [[Caprimulgidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]], where it is found in [[Sumatra]] and [[Java]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
